creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #3)
I use Synth together with ccache on current. Maybe ccache is the root cause. Beyond ccache, only certain UTF-8 sequences makes msgfmt segfault. Would it be possible to add an NLS knob to the port's Makefile? Hopefully OP can chime in on his environment.
